cases.query: Give me a short workflow to ask voice questions and get audio replies in Hindi for farmers.
cases.response_preview:
To ask voice questions and get audio replies, follow these steps: 
Speak your question, it will be transcribed, then an AI will generate a response, 
which will be played back to you as an audio reply in Hindi.

cases.query: Explain Kharif vs Rabi crops in India with examples and sowing windows.
cases.response_preview: In India, Kharif crops are sown during monsoon (June to September), like rice, maize, and soybean. Rabi crops are sown in winter (October to February), like wheat, mustard, and gram. Check local sowing windows for specif

cases.query: Punjab mein gehu mein yellow rust ke lakshan aur turant upay batao.

cases.query: My cotton crop in Maharashtra has pink bollworm risk. Give integrated pest management steps.

cases.query: For paddy in eastern India, suggest irrigation and fertilizer schedule for tillering to panicle stage.

cases.query: PM-KISAN aur Fasal Bima Yojana ka fayda kya hai, apply kaise karein?
cases.response_preview: PM-KISAN aur Fasal Bima Yojana se kisanon ko finanical madad milti hai. PM-KISAN ke liye aap online apply kar sakte hain, official website par jayein aur form bharein. Fasal Bima Yojana ke liye bank ya local agriculture
